subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Mention hath been made of thee, and thy services in the path of God have been laid before the Most Holy and Exalted Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی مهاجر ذکرت را نمود و خدماتت را فی سبیل الله در ساحت امنع اقدس معروض
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
